apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of peace in real-life scenarios (conflict resolution, diplomacy, etc.).
Students will be able to design a plan for promoting peace in a community or organization.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of peace-building initiatives.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the complex factors that contribute to peace and conflict.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of globalization on peace and conflict.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different peace-building strategies.
remember: Students will be able to recall the meaning and concept of peace.
Students will be able to identify the different types of peace (negative peace and positive peace).
Students will be able to give examples of peace in different contexts (international and national).
understand: Students will be able to understand the significance of peace in international relations.
Students will be able to analyze the importance of peace in resolving conflicts and promoting economic development.
Students will be able to comprehend the role of international organizations in promoting peace.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of peace and its significance in international relations.
Describe the different types of peace and their characteristics.
Discuss the role of international organizations in promoting peace and preventing conflict.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of peace and its importance in maintaining international relations.
Describe the different forms of peace and their characteristics.
Discuss the role of peace in promoting economic development and resolving conflicts.
